title: Egyptian Smoked Fish
description: A classic Egyptian dish that combines smoky flavors with tender fish.
instructions: Place the smoked fish on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the fish for 12-15 minutes or until it's cooked through.
While the fish is baking, toast the Egyptian flatbread in the oven for 2-3 minutes or until crispy.
In a small bowl, mix together the roasted garlic aioli and lemon juice.
Once the fish is done, let it cool for a few minutes before flaking it into pieces.
To assemble the dish, place a piece of toasted flatbread on a plate, top with some flaked fish, a spoonful of the garlic aioli mixture, and a sprinkle of cilantro.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
